input_text: An employee submits an invoice. The manager reviews it. If the amount exceeds 5000 EUR, finance must approve it. After approval, payment is triggered.

An employee creates a purchase request and submits it to the manager. The manager checks the request. If the request is incomplete, it is sent back to the employee. If the amount is above 10000 EUR, procurement reviews it. After final approval, a purchase order is created.

A department submits a budget request. Finance reviews the available budget. If sufficient funds are available, the budget is approved. Otherwise, the request is rejected. Risks include delayed approval and missing financial data.

An employee submits a vacation request through the HR system. The direct manager reviews the request. If the requested dates overlap with a critical project phase, the manager may reject the request. Otherwise, the request is approved and the employee is notified.

A buyer submits a request to onboard a new supplier. Procurement collects the supplier's tax documents and banking information. Compliance checks whether the supplier meets regulatory requirements. If any required document is missing, the request is sent back to procurement. Once all checks are completed successfully, the supplier is activated in the system. Risks include missing documents and compliance delays.
